kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The Carpenter's levy is higher than both Edmund and the artisan in Kingsford.
Between Aldric and Rowan, one goes with Highrow and the other with 5 coins.
Either Rowan belongs to the Market Ward or both members of the Joiners' Guild belong to the Market Ward (but not both).
Either Godfrey goes with Mason or someone in the Gate Ward goes with 7 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Aldric goes with Cooper; Aldric goes with 13 coins; Southgate goes with 5 coins.
Tanner goes with at least two of Matilda, Eastcheap, and 9 coins.
More members of the North Side are in the Ironmongers' Guild than members of the South Side.
Kingsford, Oldwall, and Southgate go with Matilda, Carpenter, and 13 coins, in some order.
Exactly three of Beatrix, Matilda, the Potter, and the artisan with 7 coins belong to the South Side.
Godfrey's levy is higher than both the Potter and the artisan in Highrow.
Oldwall goes with Carpenter if and only if Kingsford goes with 9 coins.
